description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear design with large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, with a mix of flat roofs and open terraces, some of which are partially covered by black steel or concrete beams. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with black accents framing the windows and structural elements. The building includes a prominent entryway with a sheltered overhang and a paved area leading up to it, as well as landscaped elements such as stylized trees and planters. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows, balconies, and a rooftop lounge area, suggesting a focus on both functionality and aesthetics. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for a high-end urban office environment.
description: A sleek, modern office building with large glass windows, white and gray facades, black structural accents, and open terraces. The design emphasizes natural light, geometric forms, and contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, black framing elements, and a partially open upper terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's layered volumes, vertical window strips, and the paved entry area with black overhangs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying extensive glazing, a rooftop lounge, stylized landscaping, and a mix of window sizes and balcony spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring solid wall sections, a rooftop terrace, and additional windows, with landscaping visible on the left.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large rectangular windows in vertical and horizontal bands, with some floor-to-ceiling glazing and grouped window arrangements.
